<think> I'm thinking of famous American news anchors who have contributed to CBS's "60 Minutes". I'm trying to recall any notable interviews with Saddam Hussein around that time period... I think I remember that Dan Rather was a prominent anchor at CBS during that time, and I've heard of him interviewing Saddam Hussein in the past. I'm going to take a chance and see if this is the correct answer.</think>
<answer> Dan Rather </answer>
